word: G5099 - τίνω - tínō - tee'-no - Be punished with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be punished with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Strengthened for a primary word τίω tiō (which is only used as an alternate in certain tenses); to pay a price, that is, as a penalty: - be punished with.
